title: [Bug]: When using the IFNULL function, executing the query results in an Internal error.
description: <!-- A clear and concise description of bug. -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_ifnull (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 VARCHAR(10), value3 DATE);
INSERT INTO test_ifnull (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, NULL, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO test_ifnull (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (2, 10, NULL, '2023-01-02');
SELECT COALESCE(value1, value2) FROM test_ifnull WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COALESCE(NULL, value1) FROM test_ifnull WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: Executing query with IFNULL function causes internal error
